blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Google Sheets API authentication failure - service account may not have access to the sheet. Cannot verify data structure or sorting without successful API connection.
Cannot test empty sheet scenario because the Google Sheets API connection is failing with authentication error. The empty sheet test requires the API connection to work first.
Google Sheets API authentication failure prevents testing the stats endpoint. Cannot verify stat calculations without working data source.
Google Sheets API error prevented observing normal loading state

frictions.description: Google Sheets API authentication failure affecting multiple API assertions. Both /api/calls and /api/calls/stats return 500 errors.
Dashboard error banner 'Unable to load dashboard data right now' due to Google Sheets API 500 error. The UI gracefully handles this by showing 0 values and placeholder states.
frictions.resolution: Dashboard implements proper error handling with fallback UI - cards show 0 values and donut chart shows 'No calls yet' placeholder

blockers.description: Google Sheets API authentication failure - both /api/calls and /api/calls/stats return 500 errors with 'Failed to fetch calls' / 'Failed to fetch call stats' messages. Service account may lack access to the spreadsheet.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried requests multiple times, verified server is running on port 3000, confirmed 500 status code with proper error object structure

appliedUpdates.description: Updated server start command to use 'npm run build && npm run start' instead of dev server. Added Flow Validator Guidance section with isolation rules, testing approach, API testing via curl, evidence collection guidelines, and known quirks about localStorage and Google Sheets behavior.
Fixed healthcheck command to use curl.exe instead of curl for Windows compatibility

summary: Tested 21 assertions for milestone 'foundation': 16 passed, 5 blocked. All UI assertions (navigation and dashboard cards) passed successfully. API assertions are blocked by Google Sheets API authentication issues that prevent data fetching. The app handles these errors gracefully with proper fallback UI. VAL-API-003 passed because the API correctly returns an error object with status 500 when the Sheets API fails.
